title: Using 'with' keyword with table returning function crashes monetdb
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(x VARCHAR, y VARCHAR, z VARCHAR, a INTEGER, b FLOAT, c DATE);
CREATE TABLE results_table AS SELECT * FROM test_function(x, y, z) FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE boundary_test AS SELECT * FROM test_function(NULL, 'test', DATE '2023-01-01');
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE a > (SELECT MAX(a) FROM test_table);
key_bug_features: Using 'with' keyword in table returning function
